risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Project Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain at High level, creating persistent constraints on project implementation capacity and stakeholder coordination across implementing agencies (MoWE, EEU, DBE).

risk_summary: Substantial institutional capacity risks for implementation and sustainability persist, likely compounded by the high political and governance risk environment, affecting the ability of implementing agencies to execute project activities and maintain systems.
